metadata.description: Curated ADA database: only rows with reported ADA/immunogenicity; tiered traceability.

rules.skip: Empty ada_value or explicit N/A / not reported.
rules.tier_A: PMID (field, PMID: text, or pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/ID URL) OR FDA accessdata.fda.gov OR clinicaltrials.gov.
rules.tier_B: Has at least one http(s) URL but no Tier-A anchor (still traceable, real ADA citation).
rules.tier_C: No URL and no PMID/FDA/ClinicalTrials anchor.
rules.pubmed_flag: Optional esearch returns PMIDs only; never auto-fill ADA numbers.
